No, employees aren’t legally required to report positive COVID-19 tests to employers
Employers can ask employees to report positive COVID-19 test results, but workers aren’t required to do so by law.
No, there isn't a COVID variant named 'Centaurus'
A Twitter user nicknamed omicron subvariant BA.2.75 “Centaurus” on July 1, but BA.2.75 has not been given an official name by the World Health Organization.
Yes, methotrexate, which can end a pregnancy, is also used to treat certain diseases
Medical organizations are reporting that some patients can’t access methotrexate in states with abortion bans. The drug is used to treat serious health conditions.
